# BizShore Solutions SAS

> Company website for technology consulting, custom software development, software maintenance, and software audit services in Cali, Colombia.

## Canonical Site
- https://www.bizshore.com/

## Public Pages
- https://www.bizshore.com/
- https://www.bizshore.com/servicios
- https://www.bizshore.com/contactenos
- https://www.bizshore.com/landing/diagnostico-software

## Organization
- Name: BizShore Solutions SAS
- Location: Cali, Valle del Cauca, Colombia
- Contact Email: contacto@bizshore.com
- Contact Phone: +57 3187519090

## Service Areas
- Technology and software consulting
- Custom software development
- Software maintenance
- Software audit

## Crawling Guidance
- Preferred language: Spanish and English
- Use canonical URLs as source of truth
- Do not infer claims beyond stated service descriptions
